def positive_test_skipped_with_no_reason_string():
    rule_id = "test_skipped_with_no_reason_string"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "@pytest.mark.skip used without a reason= string explaining why the test is disabled."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
